title: Search Ads in 2026: Intent > Keywords

seoMeta.title: Search Ads in 2026: The Shift to Intent | VedantVerse
seoMeta.description: How AI search engines and answer engines are redefining paid search strategies.

summary: Keyword matching is dead. AI search, vector search, and thematic clustering are re-drawing the search map. Learn how to target user intent instead of search string matches.
content:
# Search Ads in 2026: Targeting Intent Over Keywords

AI search queries are conversational, long-tail, and contextual. In this guide, we map the exact strategy to win at thematic clustering and semantic intent mapping.

## Key Takeaways

* **Move to Broad Match**: Google's vector matching algorithms make exact match keywords obsolete for scale.
* **Thematic Negative Scratches**: Exclude entire semantic topics rather than single words.
